title: Zillow Statistics 2026: Traffic, Market & Real Estate Trends
text: Zillow Mobile App Traffic Metrics and User Growth Analysis. Mobile App Traffic Metrics: Users view 157 homes per second on Zillow mobile apps. The Zillow app has been downloaded over 50 million times on GooglePlay. App Ratings: GooglePlay reviews: 1.22 million reviews give the Zillow app an average rating of 4.7 stars out of 5. Apple App Store: 7.1 million Apple users rate the Zillow Real Estate & Rentals app 4.8 stars out of 5. Overall User Growth: Zillow Group reported 221 million average monthly unique users across its apps and sites in Q4 2025. Q1 2026 showed the platform averaging 227 million monthly unique users, with 80% of traffic arriving directly or organically. Market Dominance: 65% of real estate mobile application traffic is on the Zillow app. Zillow's app engagement is four times higher than its closest competitor in real estate. Two-thirds of the entire relevant audience uses Zillow. Revenue Performance: Zillow Group reported $2.6B revenue in FY 2025 (up 16% year over year), demonstrating strong growth alongside increased user engagement.
